hero.title: Organize Your Daily Worship Effortlessly
hero.subtitle: Track your daily Muslim tasks like prayers, Quran reading, dhikr, and good habits, all in one place.

developer.name: Youssef Fissal
developer.description: Muslim Planner was created to help you stay consistent with your daily worship, from prayers and Quran to small habits that make a big difference over time.

features.taskDesc: Easily add, organize, and track your daily tasks.
features.quranDesc: Monitor and record your Quran reading journey.
features.motivationDesc: Stay consistent and motivated in your acts of worship.
